race.comment: RED CHICK (4) handy mare kept fresh for this after being snagged back from the wide gate with a plugging fifth over 1100m at Gosford. Since fitted with a 845m tick over trial at Wyong. Finds the right race this time and will prove hard to catch. MAY BE BUBBLES (6) flying for the new yard after scoring a dominant win first-up. Not as effective second-up when taken back in the small field before chipping away late to run second over 1200m at Warren. Fitter now from a good draw and not without top-three claims. DE JOKER (2) was an impressive winner second-up winning by a big space over 1200m at Bathurst in the heavy going. Can repeat the dose over the shorter trip. KEVIN (1) indicated he was back in good shape with a tough on-pace second over 1100m at Dubbo. Sticky map today and place preferred. FORTIANS (5) sprouted wings for a surprise win at start twenty-four over this trip on June 22. Don't dismiss.
